function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-04-19T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to the Helios tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter): INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19).

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and verified mentally: attachments were both previously read and ordered newest-first among selected two (2026-01-19 then 2025-12-18); recipient matches Miles canonical email; subject quoting with colon is valid. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-04-19T10-00-00Z.md successfully.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to work oldest inbox message. I processed the only/oldest item, verified sender identity against canonical entity, identified the oldest two invoices linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia), created one outbound reply draft with those two attachments in newest-first order per outbox rule, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check passed for this inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the request workflow.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request end-to-end: prepared a reply draft to the verified sender with the two oldest invoices linked to the tax-firm client, then cleared the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS when entering folders, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, used canonical entity primary_contact_email for identity checks, created exactly one outbox write, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox message requested a reply with the oldest 2 invoices linked to the client at the tax firm. Canonical entity records identified the sender as Miles and the client as Claudia (tax-firm contact). Invoice records confirmed the two oldest linked invoices were issued on 2025-12-18 (INV-0006) and 2026-01-19 (INV-0007), and these were attached in the outbound draft before removing the processed inbox item.
completed_steps_laconic: identified and read the 2 oldest linked invoices
